prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-XMASSTOCKING-80554X-RUZ Product Type: HOME_FURNITURE_AND_DECOR Brand (from catalog): Ruz Existing Title: Kids Red Jumbo Holiday Stocking with Plush Faux Fur Trim 18 Inch Tall Description: Decorate your mantle this holiday season in classic style with the Kidplokio Kids Holiday Stocking.

This super-soft stocking is made of a durable yet luxurious red plush material. It features a white faux-fur cuff for a classic holiday look and comes with a sturdy hanging loop that can easily be hung from just about any hook or mantle.

The sock measures about 18" in length and features a wide opening so it can easily be stuffed full of toys, candies, snacks, and other goodies for your child to open during the holidays. Young kids will love waking up to this holiday stocking full of treasures and treats. Search Terms: holiday stockings christmas home decor for kids girls stocking stuffers boys santa presents from childrens party favors Features: - JUMBO HOLIDAY STOCKING - This stocking measures 18" in length and features a wide opening so it can easily be stuffed full of candy, treats, gifts and small toys for your little one to open up over the holidays - SUPER SOFT MATERIAL - The sock is made of a durable yet luxurious soft red plush material and features a faux-fur white cuff for a classic holiday look; this is a great addition to any holiday decor - LOOP HOOK FOR EASY HANGING - The stocking comes with a sturdy hanging loop hook that can easily be hung from most mantles or fireplaces - CLASSIC HOME DECOR - Holiday stockings add a warm and cozy feel to just about any living room or den during the holidays; young kids will love waking up to this stocking full of treasures and presents - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: Plush and Faux-fur, Colors: Red & White, Size: 18" Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Ruz 18in Red Jumbo Holiday Stocking with Plush Faux Fur

anthropic.title_differentiation: Super Soft Plush Material, White Faux-Fur Cuff, Sturdy Hanging Loop, Wide Opening For Stuffing, Classic Holiday Decor

openai.title_differentiation: Soft Plush, Faux-Fur Cuff, Sturdy Hanging Loop, Wide Opening, 18" Tall, Holds Treats And Small Gifts
